_comment: V6.0 — Default OSV ecosystem allowlist. The source-controlled file is the source of truth; an optional THREATPULSE_OSV_ECOSYSTEMS env var on the public site can override it. The Blob bootstrap state records the SHA-256 of this config plus processing progress; it is not the authoritative configuration source. The list is informed by OSV's official ecosystems.txt and is configurable. To add or remove ecosystems, edit this file (or set the env var) — no code changes required.
